name: Reporting Respiratory Hazards in Riverton

mainEntity.name: Are there Utah-specific reporting requirements for respiratory hazards in Riverton?
mainEntity.text: Are there Utah-specific reporting requirements for respiratory hazards in Riverton?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah OSHA 1910.1020 mandates medical records retention 30 years; report injuries via DOLI Form 109 within 7 days.

suggestedAnswer.text: Riverton employers must track via Log 300. Employees request access. Non-compliance penalties aid claims. Annual hazard surveys required.

description: Utah OSHA 1910.1020 mandates medical records retention 30 years; report injuries via DOLI Form 109 within 7 days.
